## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] New/changed code has tests and Google-style docstrings
- [ ] `README.md` / `CLAUDE.md` updated if structure or commands changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased**
